channel.title: The OpenNMS Group — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by The OpenNMS Group (opennms).

item.title: CVE-2025-53122 · 6.9 MEDIUM — SQLi in OpenNMS Horizon and Meridian
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in OpenNMS Horizon and Meridian applications allows SQL Injection. Users should upgrade to Meridian 2024.2.6 or newer, or Horizon 33.16 or newer. Merid…

item.title: CVE-2025-53121 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Stored XSS in multiple 33.0.8files in opennms/opennms
item.description: Multiple stored XSS were found on different nodes with unsanitized parameters in OpenMNS Horizon 33.0.8 and versions earlier than 33.1.6 on multiple platforms that allow an attacker to store on database and then inject HTML and/or Javascript on the p…

item.title: CVE-2023-40314 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Cross-site scripting in bootstrap.jsp
item.description: Cross-site scripting in bootstrap.jsp in multiple versions of OpenNMS Meridian and Horizon allows an attacker access to confidential session information. The solution is to upgrade to Horizon 32.0.5 or newer and Meridian 2023.1.9 or newer Meridian an…

item.title: CVE-2023-40612 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Authenticated XXE Injection Via The File Editor
item.description: In OpenMNS Horizon 31.0.8 and versions earlier than 32.0.2, the file editor which is accessible to any user with ROLE_FILESYSTEM_EDITOR privileges is vulnerable to XXE injection attacks. The solution is to upgrade to Meridian 2023.1.5 or Horizon 32.0…

item.title: CVE-2023-40315 · 5.3 MEDIUM — ROLE_FILESYSTEM_EDITOR Can Be Used To Escalate To ROLE_ADMIN
item.description: In OpenMNS Horizon 31.0.8 and versions earlier than 32.0.2 and related Meridian versions, any user that has the ROLE_FILESYSTEM_EDITOR can easily escalate their privileges to ROLE_ADMIN or any other role. The solution is to upgrade to Meridian 2023.1…

item.title: CVE-2023-40313 · 7.1 HIGH — Disable BeanShell Interpreter Remote Server Mode
item.description: A BeanShell interpreter in remote server mode runs in OpenMNS Horizon versions earlier than 32.0.2 and in related Meridian versions which could allow arbitrary remote Java code execution. The solution is to upgrade to Meridian 2023.1.6, 2022.1.19, 20…

item.title: CVE-2023-40312 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Reflected XSS in multiple JSP files in opennms/opennms
item.description: Multiple reflected XSS were found on different JSP files with unsanitized parameters in OpenMNS Horizon 31.0.8 and versions earlier than 32.0.2 on multiple platforms that an attacker can modify to craft a malicious XSS payload. The solution is to upg…

item.title: CVE-2023-40311 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Stored XSS in multiple JSP files in opennms/opennms
item.description: Multiple stored XSS were found on different JSP files with unsanitized parameters in OpenMNS Horizon 31.0.8 and versions earlier than 32.0.2 on multiple platforms that allow an attacker to store on database and then load on JSPs or Angular templates.…

item.title: CVE-2023-0872 · 8.2 HIGH — ROLE_REST can be used to escalate to ROLE_ADMIN via /rest/users
item.description: The Horizon REST API includes a users endpoint in OpenMNS Horizon 31.0.8 and versions earlier than 32.0.2 on multiple platforms is vulnerable to elevation of privilege. The solution is to upgrade to Meridian 2023.1.6, 2022.1.19, 2021.1.30, 2020.1.38…

item.title: CVE-2023-0871 · 5.4 MEDIUM — An XML External Entity injection vulnerability
item.description: XXE injection in /rtc/post/ endpoint in OpenMNS Horizon 31.0.8 and versions earlier than 32.0.2 on multiple platforms is vulnerable to XML external entity (XXE) injection, which can be used for instance to force Horizon to make arbitrary HTTP request…

item.title: CVE-2023-0870 · 8.1 HIGH — Form Can Be Manipulated with Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)
item.description: A form can be manipulated with cross-site request forgery in multiple versions of OpenNMS Meridian and Horizon. This can potentially allow an attacker to gain access to confidential information and compromise integrity. The solution is to upgrade to…

item.title: CVE-2023-0815 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Plaintext Password Present in the Web logs
item.description: Potential Insertion of Sensitive Information into Jetty Log Files in multiple versions of OpenNMS Meridian and Horizon could allow disclosure of usernames and passwords if the logging level is set to debug. Users should upgrade to Meridian 2023.1.0 o…

item.title: CVE-2023-0867 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Multiple stored and reflected Cross-site Scripting in webapp
item.description: Multiple stored and reflected cross-site scripting vulnerabilities in webapp jsp pages in multiple versions of OpenNMS Meridian and Horizon could allow an attacker access to confidential session information. Users should upgrade to Meridian 2023.1.0…

item.title: CVE-2023-0868 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Stealing Cookies using Reflected XSS via graph results
item.description: Reflected cross-site scripting in graph results in multiple versions of OpenNMS Meridian and Horizon could allow an attacker access to steal session cookies. Users should upgrade to Meridian 2023.1.0 or newer, or Horizon 31.0.4. Meridian and Horizon…

item.title: CVE-2023-0869 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Cross-site scripting in outage/list.htm
item.description: Cross-site scripting in outage/list.htm in multiple versions of OpenNMS Meridian and Horizon allows an attacker access to confidential session information. The solution is to upgrade to Meridian 2023.1.0 or newer, or Horizon 31.0.4 or newer. Meridian…

item.title: CVE-2023-0846 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Unauthenticated, stored XSS in display of alarm reduction-key
item.description: Unauthenticated, stored cross-site scripting in the display of alarm reduction keys in multiple versions of OpenNMS Horizon and Meridian could allow an attacker access to confidential session information. Users should upgrade to Meridian 2023.1.0 or…
